evals.prompt: Open google.com and tell me the title of the page.
Go to https://example.com and take a screenshot of the page.
evals.expected_output: A screenshot file should be generated.

evals.prompt: Search for 'Millennial Perfumer' on Google and give me the first snippet of information you find.
evals.expected_output: Information about Millennial Perfumer should be extracted.
